concerns.text: FR-006 mandates 'permutation-based p-values' and FDR correction. T026 (FDR) is marked complete, but T025 (permutation p-values) is incomplete. The task list fails to deliver the prerequisite data (p-values) required to satisfy the FR-006 constraint, effectively weakening the requirement to 'FDR on null values' or omitting the statistical test entirely.

Constitution Principle VII and SC-002/SC-003 require validation on an independent literature dataset (e.g., Kr on CNTs). T035a (curate dataset) and T035 (load/validate) are marked incomplete. Without these tasks, the system cannot execute the 'Physicochemical Plausibility Validation' mandated by the Constitution, rendering the scientific hypothesis untestable.

Constitution Principle I (Reproducibility) and the Spec's 'Independent Test' scenarios require a runnable test suite. T010 (pytest config) and T008 (data classes) are incomplete. The absence of a configured test runner and core data entities prevents the verification of FR-003 (material-level split) and SC-001, violating the reproducibility constraint.

SC-004 requires measuring pipeline runtime against the GitHub Actions free-tier limit. T039 (performance optimization/benchmarking) is incomplete. There is no task to actually execute the pipeline on the target runner and record the time, meaning the SC-004 acceptance criterion cannot be verified.

The Spec's Edge Cases explicitly require a diagnostic report when R² < 0.5. T034 (diagnostic report generation) is incomplete. The system lacks the defined failure mode response required by the spec, violating the acceptance criteria for edge case handling.
